heading: Applicability of part
label: 300ff–140 Applicability of part
text: This part shall not apply in a State if the chief executive officer of the State certifies to the Secretary that the law of the State is substantially consistent with this part.
notes: Effective DateSection effective as if enacted on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note under .Sept. 30, 2009section 2(a)(3)(B) of Pub. L. 111–87section 300ff–11 of this title
